steps.title: Set up
steps.content:
Plug $x = 0$ into $h(x) = x + b$:
$$h(0) = 0 + b = b$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $26$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $26$ is the value to enter.
